rss.title: All six crew members killed after US refuelling plane crashes in Iraq
rss.snippet: The US Central Command says all six crew members died after a refuelling aircraft went down over western Iraq.

rss.title: Bodies of 84 Iranian sailors killed in US torpedo strike to be repatriated
rss.snippet: The seamen died when Iranian warship the Iris Dena was sunk on 4 March by a US submarine near Sri Lanka.

rss.title: Cuba says it will release 51 prisoners in the coming days
rss.snippet: Havana says it is in talks with Washington as no fuel has entered the island in three months.

arxiv_papers.title: The effects of International Monetary Fund programs: a systematic review with narrative synthesis on poverty, inequality, and social indicators
arxiv_papers.snippet: This systematic review with narrative synthesis examines the social impacts of International Monetary Fund (IMF) programs. arxiv_papers.title: Closing the SNAP Gap: Identifying Under-Enrollment in High-Poverty ZIP Codes
arxiv_papers.snippet: This project began by constructing an index of economic insecurity using multiple socioeconomic indicators. podcast: [What would your "deathbed self" tell you today? | Lauren Deeley] What if the key to making better decisions today is getting to know the person you'll become tomorrow? Drawing on psychological research and real-life stories, private wealth advisor Lauren Deeley explores how building a meaningful connection with your "deathbed self" can bring more clarity, joy and intention to the life you're building right now.Learn more about our flagship conference happening
